files.patch:
@@ -1,11 +1,5 @@
-error: argument `value` must be of type `secret` (got `string`)
- --> tests/packages/udo-args/udo-args-named-typed-secret-literal.tql:6:35
-  |
-6 | argspkg::typed_named_secret value="const"
-  |                                   ^^^^^^^ 
-  |
-  = usage: argspkg::typed_named_secret value=secret
-  = note: parameters:
-            named:
-              name   type    default  description
-              value  secret  -        Must be a secret expression
+{
+  dummy: 1,
+  operator: "typed_named_secret",
+  value: "***",
+}

@@ -1,11 +1,5 @@
-error: argument `value` must be of type `secret` (got `string`)
- --> tests/packages/udo-args/udo-args-typed-secret-literal.tql:6:34
-  |
-6 | argspkg::typed_positional_secret "const"
-  |                                  ^^^^^^^ 
-  |
-  = usage: argspkg::typed_positional_secret value:secret
-  = note: parameters:
-            positional:
-              name   type    default  description
-              value  secret  -        Must be a secret expression
+{
+  dummy: 1,
+  operator: "typed_positional_secret",
+  value: "***",
+}
